4	Enrolling Your Financial Institution in PaymentStreamâ¢ Direct
4.1	Enrolling Your Financial Institution in PaymentStream Direct
Contact Central 1, Client Support Services to enroll your financial institution in
PaymentStream
Direct. Central 1 will work with you to implement the requested functionality and branding (if applicable). Access to a test system will be provided prior to implementation of the production system.
Although
PaymentStream
Direct looks like the
MemberDirect
Â®
system, the configuration of
PaymentStream
Direct isnât dependant on your
MemberDirect
setup.
Your financial institution may be required to sign an agreement with Central 1 for the implementation of some functions.
4.2	Updating a Your Financial Institutionâs PaymentStream Direct Functionality
Contact Central 1, Client Support Services to add or delete functionality to
PaymentStream
Direct. Your financial institution may be required to sign an agreement with Central 1 for the implementation of some functions.
END
